blocs.note: Historical arithmetic aggregation only. It does not imply transferability between parties.

official_declaration.runner_up_source: Returning Officer declaration reported by Nation Africa, 28 November 2025
notes: The official Gazette confirms the elected candidate and 10,431 votes. The 1,240 runner-up total is a published report of the Returning Officer declaration; it should be reconciled to Form 35B before being labelled form-certified.

archive.methodology_note: The official register and constituency totals are loaded. Stream-level Form 35A figures remain untranscribed until the historical pipeline is run and independently reviewed.

ocr.note: OCR output is a pre-fill only. No historical stream is added to the public tally until two-person review and statutory validation are complete.

portal_sync.message: New or changed IEBC forms were downloaded and the dashboard was rebuilt.
